title: スイーピー5☆入団テスト！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway with Satono
Diamond, when...
Theeere you aaaaare!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Satono! As of today, I appoint thee "Magical
Dia"!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? Magical Dia?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It is I, Magical Black, member of Magical Girl ☆
Sweepy 5!
Or something like that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You're doing this too, Kita?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Get this! Sweep created a team called
Magical Girl ☆ Sweepy 5.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And she appointed me "Magical Black" not too
long ago!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So I thought it would be great if you joined in
too... What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Our current roster consists of Magical Black,
Professor Tachyon, and me, Genius Magical Girl
Sweepy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow, and you all practice magic together? That
sounds fun. ♪ I'd love to join!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You mean it?! Excellent! ♪ Then let's dive straight
into your magical training! Um...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ah! That one! Defeat that individual standing
there!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You never know when or where an enemy will
appear. Practice is important!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But... What exactly should I do to defeat my
trainer?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll teach you all you need to know. ♪ Ready?
First chant a spell like this...

...Heh, heh, heh. Magic isn't the only method to
vanquishing one's foes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You also have the option of strengthening
yourself via a chemical concoction. I can certainly
assist you should you choose that route.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's still my time in the spotlight!
You'd rather have me teach you than Tachyon,
right, Satono?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Both of your methods sound fun. ♪
Oh! Who do you think I should go with, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Heh, heh! The natural choice! Now then, let me
show you the proper way to cast a spell. ♪ Watch
closely!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Panthus, panthus, agapanthus! Rain down, O
starlight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Nothing happens. However, as one would
expect of a self-proclaimed magical girl, her
execution certainly feels on point somehow.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Did you follow that? All you need to do is
chant a spell that fits who you are. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I think I understand. A spell that fits me...
Okay, I'll give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I know you can do it, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Behold! The dazzling glimmer of a diamond! The
radiant beacon of tranquility!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I truly see a dazzling light before me. Or at least I
get the sense I do, and collapse to the ground.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You were really sparkling! You're amazing,
Satono! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Magical Dia! I officially approve your induction
into Magical Girl ☆ Sweepy 5! You know what
this means, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I, Magical Dia, will continue to shine
ever brighter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't really understand much about magic, but
watching them have fun together seems to have
the power to bring a smile to my face.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, heh. An excellent choice!
Now then, Satono, guzzle this potion down to
strengthen your body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon takes out a strangely colored
concoction. ...Something about all this feels
worrying.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's a really weird color... You sure you wanna
drink that, Dia?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What? That's no fun. Are you really going to
chicken out?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I never go back on my decisions. Even
if it means going against my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes the potion from Agnes Tachyon and
downs it all in one gulp!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow. I've never tasted anything quite like that
before! How curious!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oho! I added extra capsaicin to increase blood
flow, and you polished it off like it was nothing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh... You're quite the intriguing
specimen! Okay, now I want you to go for a run!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
W-way to go, Magical Dia! You're now an official
member of Magical Girl ☆ Sweepy 5! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious about the capsaicin she ingested, I
approach Satono Diamond after Sweep Tosho
and the others leave.
choice_data_list: That potion earlier really wasn't spicy?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...So you noticed?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It honestly felt like my tongue was on fire.
But I couldn't exactly let everyone see me
grimace. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She quietly reveals the truth. I'm pleased to see
her doing something so typical for her age as
putting on a brave face for her friends.
